_comment: Ad account management - paginated table query. Used by search, filters, pagination and table rendering. Dimension values align with GET cockpit/meta-filter-options (appOptions/platformOptions/sourceOptions value).

keyword.description: Fuzzy keyword for appName, appId and managerAccount. Empty string means no keyword filter.

appId.description: App filter; value matches cockpit appOptions[].value (e.g. package id). Empty string means all.

platform.description: Terminal platform filter; value matches cockpit platformOptions[].value (e.g. "0" Android, "1" iOS). Empty string means all.

source.description: Ad platform filter; value matches cockpit sourceOptions[].value (string enum). Empty string means all.

status.description: Status filter. Empty string means all.

records.description: Current page records. Return [] when no data.

appId.description: Application id; same value domain as cockpit appOptions[].value.

platform.description: Terminal platform value; same value domain as cockpit platformOptions[].value.

source.description: Ad platform value; same value domain as cockpit sourceOptions[].value.

adAccounts.description: Ad account ID list. Return [] when not configured.

credential.description: Credential name. Empty string is allowed.

token.description: Raw token value or null. Frontend masks it by itself.

api.requestBody: current, size, keyword?, appId?, platform?, source?, status?

notes: Return records: [] and total: 0 when there is no data.
Do server-side pagination by current and size.
Token can be returned as raw value or null because masking is handled on the frontend.
appId/platform/source filter values must match cockpit meta-filter-options option values.

triggers.detail: Load table data when /config-management/ad-account-management is opened.
Reload when keyword, appId, platform, source, status, current or size changes.

interaction.defaultSelection: keyword, appId, platform, source and status default to empty string. current defaults to 1 and size defaults to 10.
interaction.dedupe: Use the latest request result when filters change quickly.
